/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/SerialManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/DogController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/GimbalController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/DroneController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/speaker_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/sdk/std_protocol_sdk.c.o -o client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.8.0 -lzmq -llog4cpp -lpthread /home/lonely/207机狗协同-具身点足小狗/协同控制器/207/speaker_lib/speaker_interface/lib/libspeaker_interface.a /home/lonely/207机狗协同-具身点足小狗/协同控制器/207/speaker_lib/mavftp_pro/lib/libmavftp_pro.a /home/lonely/207机狗协同-具身点足小狗/协同控制器/207/speaker_lib/mavsdk/lib/libmavsdk.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpaho-mqttpp3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpaho-mqtt3a.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblzma.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
